overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through a grassy meadow on an overcast, misty day. The character traverses rural terrain passing wooden fences, stone walls, and NPC villagers, with mountains visible in the hazy distance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the grassy meadow with wildflowers

entered.detail: muddy trail winding through the meadow with visible tire tracks
tall green grass with red poppies and blue wildflowers
tall green grass with white wildflowers
dense forest line marking the edge of the meadow
scattered trees and bushes along the horizon
misty mountain peaks visible through the overcast haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide meadow trail with Geralt walking along a dirt path surrounded by tall grass and wildflowers. The overcast sky creates diffused lighting across the landscape, with forest lines visible in the distance and misty mountains barely visible through the haze.

events.description: rustic wooden fence appears running along the left side of the path
group of NPC villagers comes into view walking ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path beside the wooden fence, approaching the NPCs ahead

notable_agents.action: group of three villagers walking along the path in the same direction

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence posts running parallel to the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail continues with a wooden fence now lining the left side as the path curves gently. The character approaches a group of NPC villagers walking ahead in the distance, while the right side remains open meadow with scattered trees.

events.description: character overtakes and passes the group of NPC villagers on the path
stone wall appears on the left side, replacing the wooden fence

agents.ego_description: passing the NPC villagers and continuing along the winding path toward the mountains

notable_agents.action: villagers being overtaken and passed on the trail

entered.detail: low stacked stone wall running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The character catches up to and passes the NPC villagers on the trail. The wooden fence gives way to a stone wall on the left as the path continues toward the misty mountains, which shift to the left side of the frame as the camera progresses along the curving trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural trail that transitions from an open, wildflower-filled meadow toward a more structured path bordered by stone. It begins with Geralt walking through tall grass under a diffused, overcast sky, with distant forest lines and misty mountains barely visible through the haze. As the path curves gently, a wooden fence appears on the left and the camera approaches a group of NPC villagers walking ahead. The scene then shifts as the character passes the villagers and the wooden fence gives way to a stone wall, while the misty mountains gradually drift toward the left side of the frame.
